questions.question: Explain the difference between correlation and convolution in image processing.
expectedPoints: Correlation involves sliding a kernel over an image without rotation
Convolution involves rotating the kernel by 180 degrees before sliding
For symmetric kernels, both operations produce identical results

questions.question: Compare and contrast mean, median, and Gaussian filters, including their applications and limitations.
expectedPoints: Mean filter: simple averaging, blurs edges, fast computation
Median filter: non-linear, preserves edges, effective for impulse noise
Gaussian filter: weighted averaging, better edge preservation than mean filter
